rationale: The cited paper is directly aligned with the citing paper’s stated prior-work baseline: the citing note says earlier social-media work focused on message-level engagement outcomes, while this cited study is exactly an image/text-content-to-engagement paper on Twitter/Instagram. Both papers also use multimodal social-media content analytics (text + image), so this citation is plausibly a substantive theory/method/comparison anchor rather than an incidental mention.
